subject: New Opening: Microservices Engineer
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: FlexTel
ROLE: Senior Microservices Engineer
START: 2024-07-02
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / on-site
RATE: 1000 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, GCP and Docker.

Key requirements:
• Java
• GCP
• Docker

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Ida Fredriksson
Account Manager
PeakRecruit
Tel: +46 73 566 78 90
